subcodes.first_line: He verily hath taken the Covenant at the hour of dawning from them that have believed, that they should worship none but God and should not corrupt [3.5s]... ...I sorrow not for the burden of My imprisonment. Neither do I grieve over My abasement, or the tribulation I suffer at the hands of Mine enemies
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخذ المیثاق حین الاشراق من الذین آمنوا ان لا یعبدوا الا الله و لایفسدوا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of the Manifestation of God, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
